narration: Without relativity, your GPS would drift by kilometers every day!
visual_description: Hook visual: Without relativity, your GPS would drift by kilometers every day!
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Without relativity, your GPS would drift by kilometers every day!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Without relativity, your GPS would drift by kilometers every day!

narration: GPS satellites move fast and are far from us, causing time to act differently.
visual_description: Context visual: GPS satellites move fast and are far from us, causing time to act differently.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: GPS satellites move fast and are far from us, causing time to act differently.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: GPS satellites move fast and are far from us, causing time to act differently.

narration: Special relativity says time slows down for moving objects—like satellites.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Special relativity says time slows down for moving objects—like satellites.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Special relativity says time slows down for moving objects—like satellites.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Special relativity says time slows down for moving objects—like satellites.

narration: Meanwhile, general relativity states gravity affects time too—satellites are further from Earth's pull.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, general relativity states gravity affects time too—satellites are further from Earth's pull.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, general relativity states gravity affects time too—satellites are further from Earth's pull.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, general relativity states gravity affects time too—satellites are further from Earth's pull.

narration: Together, these effects cause GPS clocks to gain time—up to 38 microseconds daily!
visual_description: Payoff visual: Together, these effects cause GPS clocks to gain time—up to 38 microseconds daily!
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Together, these effects cause GPS clocks to gain time—up to 38 microseconds daily!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Together, these effects cause GPS clocks to gain time—up to 38 microseconds daily!

narration: So next time you navigate, remember Einstein’s theories keep you on track.
visual_description: Cta visual: So next time you navigate, remember Einstein’s theories keep you on track.
ai_image_prompt: Cta visual: So next time you navigate, remember Einstein’s theories keep you on track.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Cta visual: So next time you navigate, remember Einstein’s theories keep you on track.
